data.name: InvalidMembershipPeriod
data.value: The end date must be strictly after the start date.

data.name: InvalidMembershipPlan
data.value: The specified membership plan is invalid.

data.name: InvalidMembershipStatus
data.value: The membership status transition is not allowed.

data.name: DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the membership operation.

data.name: InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Memberships.
